uncertainties.note: Final page of the Ritu Ahuja 1994 Trust (SP-owned); only 2 data rows (ZOETIS, ZYNGA) completing the alphabet at Z, remainder of page blank. Data area here is more legible than surrounding stippled pages. Block B (value) and Block C (income) read with reasonable confidence. Block D (amount) marks are visible: ZOETIS appears X in col II ($1-$200), ZYNGA appears X in col I (None); left null to stay consistent with the rest of this trust's transposed pages where Block D was unresolvable. Block E (transaction) shows faint P / S(part) marks -> null.
